nodes.label: AI as collaborative problem-solving partner
nodes.label_negative: AI as autonomous task completer without human input
nodes.grounding_span: I tend to collaborate with it throughout. I'd rather not just let it handle the entire thing without input from myself or someone else at work.

nodes.label: AI for resource planning and cost efficiency
nodes.label_negative: AI for administrative tasks like ordering and scheduling
nodes.grounding_span: Instead of buying a large amount of lights and just guessing we used AI to help keep costs down.

nodes.label: AI understanding of nuanced project details
nodes.label_negative: AI misunderstanding or being overwhelmed by data
nodes.grounding_span: Just feeding it all of the data at once seemed to overwhelm it.

nodes.label: AI reliability and accuracy
nodes.label_negative: AI unreliability and need for verification
nodes.grounding_span: They will have to check and make sure the overall responses are correct

nodes.label: AI for problem-solving time savings
nodes.label_negative: AI for tasks requiring personal relationships and local knowledge
nodes.grounding_span: problem solving where a person could save a great deal of time on these sorts of situations

nodes.label: Cost efficiency and resource optimization
nodes.grounding_span: Instead of buying a large amount of lights and just guessing we used AI to help keep costs down.

nodes.label: Human oversight and control
nodes.grounding_span: I'd rather not just let it handle the entire thing without input from myself or someone else at work.

nodes.label: Productivity and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: someone taking a half hour to do that beats someone taking a few hours

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for planning tasks
nodes.grounding_span: The Christmas lights scenario I was really satisfied with in the end as it really helped and everyone involved was happy with the results.

nodes.label: Frustration with early AI misunderstanding
nodes.grounding_span: when these types of AI first started coming up and weren't as advanced as they are not was annoying with it not understanding what I actually wanted from it

nodes.label: Preference for handling administrative tasks personally
nodes.grounding_span: scheduling, ordering or sending emails are things that I would rather do myself

nodes.label: Openness to future AI use for communications
nodes.grounding_span: I could see once it gets better using it with emails or communications between people.

nodes.label: Iterative back-and-forth refinement
nodes.grounding_span: the back-and-forth was easier in trying to get the AI to understand the overall project

nodes.label: Domain-specific trust calibration
nodes.grounding_span: I don't think I'd ever trust it with ordering things or scheduling.
